modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to export data from Banner 9 to Excel.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing issues exporting data from the NHIDIST screen in Banner 9. Instead of saving the text as a file, a popup window appears. This problem occurs when trying to export data into Excel.
short_description: Unable to export data from Banner 9 to Excel.
description: The user is experiencing issues exporting data from the NHIDIST screen in Banner 9. Instead of saving the text as a file, a popup window appears. This problem occurs when trying to export data into Excel.
